---
title: "TODO — imperative phrasing (Build / Wire / Add / …)"
item-id: TODO-FE-NNN
type: feature
epic-id: TODO-epic-slug
initiative: TODO-initiative-slug
gantt-id: TODO
status: open                # open | in-progress | blocked | done
owner: TODO-owner           # current owner (advisory — see docs/)
opened-date: TODO-YYYY-MM-DD
closed-date:                # populated when status: done
description: TODO — one-liner used in listing tables and the WU roll-up
related-items: []
---

## Summary

> TODO — one paragraph. What this feature delivers, who it serves, the
> current state, and (once shipped) what landed. Customer + benefit framing
> is fine here, especially for features that span multiple weeks.

## Investigation

> TODO — the build narrative: design choices, surfaces touched, dependencies
> picked. Reference media in this item's `media/` once it exists
> (placeholder paths stay as code, not links):
> `![](media/TODO-FE-NNN-IMG-design.png)`
>
> Cross-link the issues this feature resolves or the experiments it depends on.

## Weekly summaries

<!-- One `### W<N> (<date>)` entry per week the feature moves. Newest on top.
     `/disperse` appends entries and rolls the latest into the WU. -->

### W<N> (TODO-YYYY-MM-DD)

- Status: open
- TODO — one-bullet "what happened this week"

{{< include _files.md >}}

{{< include _revisions.md >}}
